name: Lustful Rails - Dead Rails
description:
Uh, yes, lustful rails, don't ask me why. I made this out of boredom. All the zombies, vampires and werewolves are pure women (I won't add nikola tesla and wolves, but there are outlaws).

So, the storyline is like Dead Rails', yet the virus is very advanced, making zombies be able to talk and have emotions instead of being, uh, "brainless". Though, the only truly affected were the women, if the virus got onto a male, the virus would kill them instead.

The intro won't likely be like the start of a run in Dead Rails, all alone (or not). Also, I was kind of lazy (and mostly because I'm sacrificing my sleep), that's why the intro is short.

THE JADE UPDATE IS HERE.
creator: The_Dukester
